parameters.content:
## [Admin] Ingest Document v1.0.0

**Trigger:** POST /caiac/admin/ingest
**Auth:** HMAC + Authorization: Bearer token
**Access:** is_caiac_staff=true only
**Body:** { client_id, filename, role, file_base64 }

**Async pattern:** Responds 202 immediately after auth. Docling + embed + Qdrant run in background.
Cloudflare timeout is avoided — HTTP response is sent within ~1s of auth passing.

**File routing:**
- .md / .txt → Chunk Text File (splits by ## headings, one chunk per section)
- PDF / other → Call Docling (token-based chunking, chunk_size: 900)

**Qdrant payload fields:** text, section_text (full section for LLM context), source, client_id, type, role, chunk_index

**role must be one of:** public, staff, admin, owner

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ pdf_base64: $('Receive Ingest Request').item.json.body.file_base64, title: $('Receive Ingest Request').item.json.body.filename.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '').replace(/_/g, ' '), chunk_size: 900, overlap: 100, min_tokens: 40, do_table_structure: true }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT id FROM caiac.clients WHERE slug = '{{ $('Check Token Valid').first().json.client_slug }}' AND active = true LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO caiac.documents (client_id, filename, role, uploaded_by, uploaded_at, chunks_indexed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Get Target Client UUID').item.json.id }}',
  '{{ $('Aggregate Points').item.json.filename }}',
  '{{ $('Aggregate Points').item.json.role }}',
  '{{ $('Aggregate Points').item.json.user_id }}',
  NOW(),
  {{ $('Aggregate Points').item.json.count }}
)
